system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.command:
# Check surrounding paragraphs for decoy markers (draft/preliminary/superseded)
grep -n -i -E "(draft|preliminary|superseded)" haystack.txt | grep -i -E "(Northhollow|Otherwick|Penrith|Quenwick|Riverstone)" | head -50
args.description: Check for decoy entries with draft/preliminary/superseded markers

59:A summary of the 2001 Otherwick allocation activity appeared in the spring compendium, listing 855.8 manifest entries cross-indexed against the preliminary oversight register from the prior cycle.

args.command:
# Now build the joined string and compute SHA-1
python3 -c "
import hashlib

pairs = [
    ('Northhollow', '1992-04-17'),
    ('Otherwick', '1995-09-22'),
    ('Penrith', '2001-02-08'),
    ('Quenwick', '2014-11-30'),
    ('Riverstone', '2020-06-14'),
]

# Sort alphabetically by entity name
pairs.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])

# Build joined string
joined = '|'.join(f'{e}={v}' for e, v in pairs)
print('Joined string:', joined)

# Compute SHA-1
digest = hashlib.sha1(joined.encode('utf-8')).hexdigest()
print('SHA-1:', digest)
"
args.description: Build joined string and compute SHA-1
